svg.aria-label: Unity MCP changelog — animated heartbeat timeline of releases v0.15.8 through v0.17.20

g.text: $ git log --reverse // data flows in, pulse flows out
F12 chat UX overhaul — composed inline-chip field + response pills + session clear
full-project code review sprint — 12 waves of fixes across Python + C#
inline context chips + review fixes (regex + staleness + test DRY)
F13–F14 inline-chip architecture + bare-name normalizer + review fixes
F15a-F19 chip redesign — linker disable, leading-space guard, context menus
F20–F22 bugfixes — select-all, @mention search, orphan bold
40-architect test audit — 299 new tests total, 3 P0+P1 bug fixes
